name: Avineon, Inc.
lede: Avineon runs two centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Kakinada, covering GBS, built over 28 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Avineon office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Avineon, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Avineon runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Kakinada), covering GBS. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Avineon's India footprint covers Hyderabad and Kakinada, spanning GBS. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Avineon operate in India?
faq.a: Avineon operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Avineon's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Avineon run in India?
faq.a: Avineon runs GBS centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Avineon's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Avineon's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Avineon's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Avineon's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
